critical_findings.summary: Legacy entrypoint reachable from non-approved callers
critical_findings.body: Legacy enforcement entrypoint can still be called from undeclared surfaces and weakens fail-closed boundaries.

required_fixes.body: Constrain legacy entrypoint to approved callers and hard-fail for all others.

optional_improvements.body: Plan follow-on migration to remove deprecated compatibility surfaces once downstream consumers are migrated.

failure_mode_summary: Boundary asymmetry between replay and runtime could allow malformed enforcement flow if not corrected.

raw_sections.critical_findings: 1. Legacy entrypoint reachable from non-approved callers.
raw_sections.failure_mode_summary: Boundary asymmetry between replay and runtime could allow malformed enforcement flow if not corrected.
